/CAL:  DEFENSE'S MOTION FOR TERMINATION OF PROBATION AND RESTITUTION HEARING BEFORE JUDGE ALEXANDRA GORDON/CO: DEFENSE'S MOTION FOR TERMINATION OF PROBATION IS ARGUED, SUBMITTED, AND DENIED AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD/CO: THE COURT ADMONISHES THE DEFENDANT THAT THEY SHALL NEITHER ACCESS NOR POSSESSPORNOGRAPHY OF ANY KIND AS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED AS A CONDITION OF THEIR PROBATION/CO: AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION THE DEFENDANT IS SUBJECT TO WARRANTLESS SEARCH AND ELECTRONIC SEARCH CONDITIONS, AS TO DEFENDANT'S PERSON, PROPERTY, PREMISES AND VEHICLE, ANY TIME OF THE DAY OR NIGHT, WITH OR WITHOUT PROBABLE CAUSE BY ANY PEACE, PAROLE OR PROBATION OFFICER/CTORD: THAT THE DEFENDANT SHALL SURRENDER ANY AND ALL PASSWORDS TO THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT/X: RESTITUTION HEARING HELD,/CO: VICTIM STATEMENTS ARE MADE BY CAMILLE B AND LISA C IN OPEN COURT/X: THEERE WERE NO WITNESSES,/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S EXHIBITS #1) PLEA TRANSCRIPT DATED 01-30-19, #2) VICTIM STATEMENTS, #3) DOCUMENTATION OF CALCULATION OF COSTS, & #4) STATEMENT FROM ZOEY E/EXHMA: DEFENSE EXHIBITS A) REPORT OF DR, JOHN GREEN & B) REPORT OF CHRIS HANTZIAN WITH REPUTATION DEFENSE NETWORK/X: (PER THE JUDGE, EXHIBITS WERE INCLUDED IN PREVIOUSLY FILED DOCUMENTS, PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 4 WAS INTRODUCED IN OPEN COURT)/ARG&SUB/X: THE COURT RESERVES ITS RULING AND TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION, THE COURT INFORMS COUNSEL THAT A WRITTEN ORDER WILL BE ISSUED AND MAILED TO THEM/ THERE ARE NO FUTURE DATES,  ALL EXHIBITS RETAINED AND REMAIN IN THE CUSTODY OF THE JUDGE,/
